reasoning: Task is to produce a concise summary of the provided news excerpt.
output: Plymouth Argyle (the Gulls) sold a Republic of Ireland midfielder to Bournemouth in 2012 for £175,000, with a 15% sell-on clause. The O’Kane transfer to Bournemouth was for an undisclosed fee, but any money will go to help the cash-strapped club, according to Nicholson. Argyle are still seeking new owners after being taken over by a local business consortium last summer; they closed the academy and drastically reduced the playing budget following former owner Thea Bristow’s departure.
